## Validation

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to Koinos One and the active `teleno_node` runtime.
- [ ] User-facing GUI copy is reflected in both English and Spanish in `src/i18n.ts`.
- [ ] Documentation is in English and updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] Changelog or release notes are updated when the change is user-facing.
- [ ] Generated outputs and local run artifacts are not committed.
- [ ] No private hostnames, IPs, SSH users, secrets, wallet keys, producer addresses, or local inventory details are included.
- [ ] No live mainnet mutation is hidden in the change or validation.
